decision: Use a staged governance decision engine instead of a black-box classifier.
tradeoffs: Improves explainability and auditability for hackathon review
Does not provide production-grade ML accuracy
humanOversight: High-risk and rights-sensitive outcomes require review or escalation.
references: UNICEF Guidance on AI and Children
UNESCO Recommendation on the Ethics of AI

decision: Separate context policy from harm-rule matching.
tradeoffs: Prevents unknown age from becoming harm evidence
Still applies child-safe defaults in child-directed and mixed-audience contexts
humanOversight: Context alone does not trigger human review; harm rules do.
references: UNICEF AI chatbots and companions policy brief
UNICEF Guidance on AI and Children

decision: Default to no content or metadata-only retention unless high-risk review requires a redacted excerpt.
humanOversight: Full content retention requires explicit justification.
